status: Clean hierarchy draft, Level 1 and Level 2 only

hierarchy_levels.name: Field
hierarchy_levels.description: The whole domain of Artificial Intelligence.

hierarchy_levels.name: Major Area
hierarchy_levels.description: Large, relatively stable areas of AI.

hierarchy_levels.name: Subfield
hierarchy_levels.description: Main subareas inside each major area.

hierarchy_levels.name: Method, Architecture, or Model Family
hierarchy_levels.description: Future level. Deeper technical families and approaches.

hierarchy_levels.name: Technique, Component, or Variant
hierarchy_levels.description: Future level. Internal mechanisms and variants.

hierarchy_levels.name: System, Application, Product, or Concrete Model
hierarchy_levels.description: Future level. Concrete systems, products, and examples.

level_0.name: Artificial Intelligence
level_0.description: The broad field of creating systems that can perceive, learn, reason, plan, communicate, generate, decide, or act in ways associated with intelligence.

level_1.name: Symbolic AI
level_1.description: AI based on explicit symbols, rules, logic, and structured knowledge.

level_2.name: Rule-Based Systems
level_2.description: Rule-Based Systems is a Level 2 Method within Symbolic AI.

level_2.name: Expert Systems
level_2.description: Expert Systems is a Level 2 System Pattern within Symbolic AI.

level_2.name: Logic Programming
level_2.description: Logic Programming is a Level 2 Paradigm within Symbolic AI.

level_2.name: Symbolic Knowledge Representation
level_2.description: Symbolic Knowledge Representation is a Level 2 Subfield within Symbolic AI.

level_2.name: Automated Reasoning
level_2.description: Automated Reasoning is a Level 2 Subfield within Symbolic AI.

level_2.name: Constraint Satisfaction
level_2.description: Constraint Satisfaction is a Level 2 Method within Symbolic AI.

level_2.name: Knowledge Graphs
level_2.description: Knowledge Graphs is a Level 2 System Pattern within Symbolic AI.

level_2.name: Neuro-Symbolic AI
level_2.description: Neuro-Symbolic AI is a Level 2 Paradigm within Symbolic AI.

level_1.name: Machine Learning
level_1.description: AI systems that learn patterns from data rather than relying only on hand-written rules.

level_2.description: Supervised Learning is a Level 2 Paradigm within Machine Learning.

level_2.description: Semi-Supervised Learning is a Level 2 Paradigm within Machine Learning.

level_2.description: Self-Supervised Learning is a Level 2 Paradigm within Machine Learning.

level_2.name: Reinforcement Learning
level_2.description: Reinforcement Learning is a Level 2 Paradigm within Machine Learning.

level_2.name: Deep Learning
level_2.description: Deep Learning is a Level 2 Subfield within Machine Learning.

level_2.description: Representation Learning is a Level 2 Paradigm within Machine Learning.

level_2.description: Transfer Learning is a Level 2 Method within Machine Learning.

level_2.description: Federated Learning is a Level 2 Method within Machine Learning.

level_2.description: Online Learning is a Level 2 Method within Machine Learning.

level_2.description: Active Learning is a Level 2 Method within Machine Learning.

level_2.description: Meta-Learning is a Level 2 Method within Machine Learning.

level_2.description: Data-Centric AI is a Level 2 Paradigm within Machine Learning.

level_1.name: Search, Planning and Optimization
level_1.description: Methods for finding good actions, paths, plans, or solutions across possible states.

level_2.name: State-Space Search
level_2.description: State-Space Search is a Level 2 Method within Search, Planning and Optimization.

level_2.description: Heuristic Search is a Level 2 Method within Search, Planning and Optimization.

level_2.description: Adversarial Search is a Level 2 Method within Search, Planning and Optimization.

level_2.description: Automated Planning is a Level 2 Method within Search, Planning and Optimization.

level_1.name: Knowledge and Reasoning

level_2.name: Ontologies
